"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7455539198901095448","book_info":{"abstract":"【玄幻/单女主/系统/双重生/微病娇/双洁/日常多/半爽文/女主戏份超多！】
王辰身穿到修仙界千载岁月，还觉醒了系统。
不料自认为已经大帝无敌的他，竟然被数千个气运之子联手所绝望镇杀！
王辰死之前浮现画面最多的，就是他那个绝美的女帝师尊。
因为她有一张绝世容颜和妖孽资质，修仙界许多气运之子便所仰慕喜欢。
而他的绝美女帝师尊对于这些都是冷眼旁观，不予理会。
但那群气运之子却认为是王辰在她的身边，威胁到了他们的追求，开始疯狂找王辰麻烦。
而王辰别的没有，唯一的特点除了帅！就是顺心而上，不服就干！
他自然不可能看见自己的师尊被别的男人祸祸，全部一律镇压。
这也导致他结仇了数不清的气运之子。
虽然他后面凭借着靠系统修炼得来的无上修为，实力强横，同境单挑无敌。
可最后还是被密密麻麻的数千气运之子秘密联手结阵，镇杀在了魔窟骨地之中。
如果再来一世，他发誓，他再也不想要拜那个女人为师了！！
可刚一睁眼，深夜发现自己重生归来的王辰。
却发现前世绝美的女帝师尊，竟然趁他睡觉时紧紧的缠抱着他身子！！？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/474d32a8cc7259cd184c03fab76f8488","author":"王小疯","author_id":"","book_id":"7455539198901095448","book_name":"刚重生，结果女帝师尊早重生了？","book_short_name":"仙辰往事","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"15万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7456629071523365400","read_count":"149606","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1089143"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"491","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,重生,女帝,单女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6dc29c4d0c77b5c2c3e3687ae43bfb9b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779163032&x-signature=nSBg7m%2FJbve4BAVDCQmwQmsSs%2BQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"536997657583364","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"72"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320115712D981EAB4305478A840B4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":33,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8802,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":39566},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7465370102431499070","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了，感情描写无比细腻，人物塑造完美，鲜活，有生命。情节新颖引人，作者笔触牵人心弦，有伏笔也记得填坑。姜绫仙对前世的内疚后悔，今生的占有欲与极致的爱全都跃然纸上，王辰负气故意捉弄姜绫仙，却也打心底的爱着姜绫仙。两人重生后都杀伐果断，本书前途无量，有多种前进方向真的很棒[爱心][求爆更][学会了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738169271,"group_id":"7455539198901095448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwbpQeqijkzY1O+kW/W9TYk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aace1391d9da445f9aca9259c5068c8f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528004&x-signature=i1huD5xo6GQD9zXw9%2F5AgvEJzus%3D","user_id":"95117759471","user_name":"杨青越"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"95117759471","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7455539198901095448","book_info":{"abstract":"【玄幻/单女主/系统/双重生/微病娇/双洁/日常多/半爽文/女主戏份超多！】
